title: Bitter Gourd and Potato Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy Chinese-inspired stir fry made with bitter gourd, potato, and tender paratha.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the bitter gourd and stir-fry until slightly tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the potato and stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes, until slightly tender.
Add the tender paratha pieces and stir-fry for another minute.
Season with salt to taste and serve hot.
Garnish with chopped scallions or sesame seeds if desired.
